steps.title: Use the positive motivation link
steps.content: The researchers found that hedonic motivation, or perceived enjoyment, positively influences users' intention to adopt premium streaming versions. A logical implication is that increasing perceived pleasantness could make premium adoption more likely.

steps.title: Reject unsupported inferences
steps.content: Choice B invents brand loyalty to Apple Music. Choice C contradicts the study by rejecting the pleasantness statement as a measure. Choice D overstates the result by claiming other factors probably do not matter. The practical implication is that companies may benefit from shaping perceived pleasantness. The answer is A.
